hooks.command: python3 -c 'import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);c=d.get("tool_input",{}).get("command","");("<<" in c and ".md" in c) and print(json.dumps({"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"禁止用 heredoc 寫 .md：改用 Write 工具（全域 CLAUDE.md 規則）"}}))'
